title: Commerce Toppers of HSC March 2026 Result
Science Toppers of HSC March 2026 Result
Symbi - Utsav 2025
description:
This year, our S.B. Patil College of Science and Commerce delivered a spectacular performance and achieved remarkable success by winning 1st Place in the Group Dance competition and 2nd Place in the Solo Dance category in Symbi - Utsav 2025, hosted by SOES’ Symbiosis Junior College Kiwale.
In Group Dance Krishna Gharte (12th Commerce), Dhairya Patil, Avadh Bhalerao, Prajeet Tilak and Saksham Khupse (12th Science) gave their marvelous performances and brought pride to the college by winning 1 st Prize. They showed the life Event of Eklavya. Where on the other hand a student from 12th Commerce Anisha Kadam wins 2nd prize in Solo Dance competition he danced on Song Rakta Charitra. Students achieved this success under the guidance of Mrs. Shital Shende, Cultural Incharge SBPCSC.

title: Best Teacher Awards
description: r. S. N. Patil, the Principal of S.B. Patil College of Science and Commerce in Ravet, Pune, was recently felicitated with the Late Shri Manohar Jambhekar Ideal Teacher Award 2025 by ATSS College of Business Studies and Computer Application. Mr. Patil has been known for his dedication and leadership in guiding the institution, which has a reputation for providing quality education and fostering holistic student development under the Pimpri Chinchwad Education Trust (PCET). His recognition with this prestigious award highlights his significant contributions to the field of education and exemplary service as an ideal Teacher and Principal."

title: Eklavya Awards
description:
It was a proud day for SBPCSC.  Excellent performing students from Science and Commerce were called upon by Mrs Reshu Agarwal for appreciation and felicitation by Eklavya Awards.
								A grand celebration of culture, creativity, and learning in association with Kalagram was organised !

title: We are elated to announce that our Science Coordinator as well as Computer Science Teachers were felicitated at the ATSS College by " Late.
description:
We are elated to announce that our Science Coordinator as well as Computer Science Teachers were felicitated at the ATSS College by " Late.Shri Manohar Jambekar Shikshak Sanman Puraskar 2024 " for the dedication they have shown towards their teaching profession and  making a difference by reaching out to the soul of every learner. 

								The event was held on 13th November , 2024 at the ATSS College ,Chinchwad . This  Awards is a initiative by ATSS that acknowledges and appreciates the efforts and dedication of educators on the occasion of Teachers' Day.

title: Feedback of Science second Topper - Adarsh Shukla
description: "Myself Adarsh Sanjay shukla,I have been at [SBPCS] over the past [2YRS science].I have been impressed by the high standard of teaching of teacher. They try that students not only grasp the subject knowledge but also develop a deep understanding which help in my boards and JEE exam.the facilities and resources available at [SBPCS] are well-equipped laboratories, like library, or the activities, everything has contributed to creating a conductive learning environment."
